title.zh-TW: 使用者認證：Email 或 Google OAuth
title.en: User authentication: email or Google OAuth

body.zh-TW: 兩種登入路徑，產生相同的 User 物件（id: usr_<hex8>）。Email + Password：bcrypt 雜湊（cost ≥ 12）、密碼政策（8–128 字元、大小寫+數字、HaveIBeenPwned 洩漏檢查）、email 驗證信（24 小時效期）、失敗 5 次鎖定 15 分鐘。Google OAuth 2.0：server-side Authorization Code Flow，ID token 在後端驗證（Google JWKS），state 參數防 CSRF。帳號比對：Google sub 已存在 → 登入；email 與密碼帳號吻合 → 合併；全新 → 建立帳號。Session：JWT（7 天），透過 Authorization: Bearer 傳遞，登出以 blocklist 立即失效。
body.en: Two login paths, both producing the same User object (id: usr_<hex8>). Email + Password: bcrypt hash (cost ≥ 12), password policy (8–128 chars, upper+lower+digit, HaveIBeenPwned check), verification email (24h expiry), 5-failure lockout for 15 minutes. Google OAuth 2.0: server-side Authorization Code Flow, ID token validated on backend (Google JWKS), state parameter prevents CSRF. Account matching: Google sub exists → login; email matches password account → merge; new → create account. Session: JWT (7 days), passed via Authorization: Bearer, logout immediately invalidated via blocklist.
